weaponTalents.name: Optimist
weaponTalents.description: Weapon damage increases by 1% for every 5% of missing ammo.

weaponTalents.name: Measured
weaponTalents.description: Top half of mag: +15% ROF, -15% damage. Bottom half: -15% ROF, +15% damage.

weaponTalents.name: Perpetuation
weaponTalents.description: Headshot kills grant +1 skill tier for 10s, up to 3.

weaponTalents.name: Flatline
weaponTalents.description: Killing an enemy with a status effect grants +20% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Strained
weaponTalents.description: +5% critical hit damage for every 10% of max armor depleted.

weaponTalents.name: Spike
weaponTalents.description: Headshots grant +25% skill damage for 5s.

weaponTalents.name: Ranger
weaponTalents.description: +2% weapon damage for every 5m distance to the target.

weaponTalents.name: Close & Personal
weaponTalents.description: Kills within 7m grant +50% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Preservation
weaponTalents.description: Kills repair 2% armor over 3s.

weaponTalents.name: Rifleman
weaponTalents.description: Headshots mark the target. Hitting a marked target grants +15% weapon damage for 5s.

weaponTalents.name: Boomerang
weaponTalents.description: After reloading, the first bullet deals +100% weapon damage.

weaponTalents.name: Pummel
weaponTalents.description: 3 consecutive kills grant +50% melee damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Allegro
weaponTalents.description: +10% rate of fire.

weaponTalents.name: Frenzy
weaponTalents.description: Reloading from empty grants +20% weapon damage and +20% rate of fire for 7s.

weaponTalents.name: Ignited
weaponTalents.description: +20% weapon damage to burning enemies.

weaponTalents.name: Determined
weaponTalents.description: Kills reduce skill cooldowns by 10%.

weaponTalents.name: Surgical
weaponTalents.description: +15% critical hit chance for the first bullet in each magazine.

weaponTalents.name: Unhinged
weaponTalents.description: +35% weapon damage, -35% weapon handling.

weaponTalents.name: Naked
weaponTalents.description: +35% weapon damage when no attachments are equipped.

weaponTalents.name: In Sync
weaponTalents.description: Hitting an enemy with a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 5s.

weaponTalents.name: Capacitor (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: +5% weapon damage per skill tier equipped (up to +30% at tier 6). Resets on weapon swap.

weaponTalents.name: Eagle Bearer (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant a stack of +1% weapon damage (up to 50). Stacks reset on reload or weapon swap.

weaponTalents.name: Chameleon (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Hitting 30 body shots grants +20% weapon damage. Hitting 30 headshots grants +20% crit damage. Both can be active simultaneously.

weaponTalents.name: Agitator (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Perturb: While holstered, generates 50% less threat. After 10s holstered, primes the weapon. On swap-in: +25% Rate of Fire, +30% Weapon Damage, +100% threat for 20s. Swapping away early removes bonuses.

weaponTalents.name: Nemesis (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Marks a target on aim. Damage to marked target increases by 5% per 0.5s aimed (up to +50%).

weaponTalents.name: Pestilence (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply Plague of the Outcasts. Enemies with the plague that die spread it to nearby enemies.

weaponTalents.name: Ouroboros (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Every 10 bullets fired grants +5% weapon damage (up to +50%). Resets on reload.

weaponTalents.name: Scorpio (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply Bleed, Burn, and Shock. Enemies affected by all 3 take +20% weapon damage.

weaponTalents.name: Regicide (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Headshot kills create a 5m explosion dealing 400% weapon damage and applying bleed to all nearby enemies.

weaponTalents.name: Mosquito Song (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Hitting an enemy applies a stack (shared between players). At 5 stacks, the enemy forcefully targets the last player to apply a stack for 5s and takes +25% more damage to armor.

weaponTalents.name: Restrained (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: +25% weapon damage for 20s after your shield is destroyed.

weaponTalents.name: Elmo's Mark (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply Elmo's Mark. Marked enemies take +20% weapon damage from all sources.

weaponTalents.name: Back and Forth
weaponTalents.description: Swapping to this weapon grants +10% Rate of Fire and +9% Weapon Damage for 10s. Swapping from grants +5% Rate of Fire and +4.5% Weapon Damage for 10s. Two instances do not stack.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Back and Forth
weaponTalents.description: Swapping to this weapon grants +13% Rate of Fire and +12% Weapon Damage for 10s. Swapping from grants +5% Rate of Fire and +4.5% Weapon Damage for 10s. Two instances do not stack.

weaponTalents.name: Cover Shooter (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shooting from cover marks the target. Marked targets take +20% weapon damage from all sources. Mark lasts 5s.

weaponTalents.name: Bighorn (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Switching to full-auto mode grants +20% weapon damage and +20% rate of fire for 5s. Switching to semi-auto mode grants +50% headshot damage for 5s.

weaponTalents.name: Payment in Kind (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant a stack of +5% weapon damage (max 10). Stacks are lost when you reload or swap weapons.

weaponTalents.name: Unnerve (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply Unnerve. Unnerved enemies deal -20% damage. Killing an Unnerved enemy grants +20% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Breathe Free (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant +5% rate of fire for 5s, stacking up to 10 times. At max stacks, gain +50% weapon damage for 5s.

weaponTalents.name: Chatterbox (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills with a full magazine grant +20% rate of fire for 10s. Reloading within 5s of a kill refills the magazine from reserves.

weaponTalents.name: Bluescreen (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply a stack of Bluescreen. At 10 stacks, the enemy is disrupted for 5s and takes +20% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Bullet King (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills do not consume ammo from the magazine. Reloading removes this effect until the next kill.

weaponTalents.name: Iron Lung (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: While aiming, shots deal +20% weapon damage. Shots that hit the same target within 1s deal an additional +5% weapon damage, stacking up to 5 times.

weaponTalents.name: Pakhan (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 10 times. At max stacks, gain +20% rate of fire for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Transfusion (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills repair 5% of your armor. Headshot kills repair 10% of your armor.

weaponTalents.name: Agonizing Bite (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Every 10th shot is a guaranteed critical hit and applies a random status effect. Shots that hit a status-affected enemy deal +20% weapon damage.

weaponTalents.name: Doctor Home (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills repair 5% of your armor. Headshot kills repair 10% of your armor and grant +20% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Merciless (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Each shot applies a Primer. Shooting a Primed enemy with the secondary fire detonates all Primers, dealing 800% weapon damage per Primer.

weaponTalents.name: Ruthless (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Each shot applies a Primer. Shooting a Primed enemy with the secondary fire detonates all Primers, dealing 800% weapon damage per Primer.

weaponTalents.name: Geri and Freki (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant a stack of +5% weapon damage (max 10). At max stacks, the next shot deals 500% weapon damage.

weaponTalents.name: Ortiz Assault Interface (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply a stack of Ortiz Protocol. At 10 stacks, the next shot deals 300% weapon damage and applies a random status effect.

weaponTalents.name: Full Stop (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Headshots apply a stack of Full Stop. At 5 stacks, the next shot deals 500% weapon damage and staggers the target.

weaponTalents.name: In Plain Sight (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant Stealth for 3s. While in Stealth, the next shot deals +100% weapon damage and is a guaranteed critical hit.

weaponTalents.name: High Priority Target (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Headshots mark the target for 10s. Shots against marked targets deal +20% weapon damage. Killing a marked target grants +30% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: The Trap (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply a stack of The Trap. At 5 stacks, the target is immobilized for 5s and takes +30% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Sandman (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant +20% weapon damage for 10s. Headshot kills extend this bonus by 5s.

weaponTalents.name: Capitulate (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply a stack of Capitulate. At 10 stacks, the target is disrupted for 5s and takes +25% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Liberty (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times. At max stacks, the next shot deals +50% weapon damage.

weaponTalents.name: Whiplash (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Shots apply a stack of Whiplash. At 10 stacks, the next shot deals 300% weapon damage and applies bleed.

weaponTalents.name: Oxpecker (Exotic)
weaponTalents.description: Kills grant +10% weapon damage for 10s. Headshot kills grant +20% weapon damage for 10s.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Stabilize
weaponTalents.description: +1% Weapon Accuracy and +1% Weapon Stability per bullet shot, up to 75%. Stopping shooting starts a 6s timer, after which bonuses reset.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect On Empty
weaponTalents.description: Reloading from empty grants 80% weapon handling for 10 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Killer
weaponTalents.description: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants 90% critical hit damage for 10 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Near Sighted
weaponTalents.description: Receive 100% stability at the cost of 35% optimal range.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Pressure Point
weaponTalents.description: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to enemies under status effects. After 3 kills, applies a random status effect to the next enemy hit.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Frenzy
weaponTalents.description: For every 8 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain 3% rate of fire and 3% weapon damage for 9 seconds when reloading from empty.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Allegro
weaponTalents.description: +15% Rate of Fire.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Flatline
weaponTalents.description: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies. After 3 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy hit.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Streamline
weaponTalents.description: Increase Weapon Damage by 47% when no Skills are on cooldown.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Overflowing
weaponTalents.description: Every 2 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.

weaponTalents.name: Future Perfection
weaponTalents.description: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 4 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Ignited
weaponTalents.description: Deal 30% weapon damage to burning enemies. After 3 kills, applies burning to the next enemy hit.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Close & Personal
weaponTalents.description: Killing a target within 7 meters grants 38% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Optimist
weaponTalents.description: Weapon damage is increased by 4.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly In Sync
weaponTalents.description: Hitting an enemy grants +20% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Precision Strike
weaponTalents.description: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks (max 2). Hitting an enemy within 20m uses all stacks to provide +35% Amplified Damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Thunder Strike
weaponTalents.description: Deals 35% extra damage to shocked targets.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Strained
weaponTalents.description: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5 seconds you are firing. Stacks up to 8 times.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Preservation
weaponTalents.description: Killing an enemy repairs 15% armor over 5 seconds. Headshot kills improves the repair to 30%.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Immobilize
weaponTalents.description: Amplifies weapon damage by 25% to ensnared enemies. After 3 kills, applies Ensnare to the next enemy hit.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Outsider
weaponTalents.description: After killing an enemy, gain 150% optimal range and 125% accuracy for 10 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Unwavering
weaponTalents.description: Swapping to this weapon grants 400% weapon handling for 5 seconds. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Measured
weaponTalents.description: The top half of the magazine has +25% rate of fire and -30% weapon damage. The bottom half has -18% rate of fire and +38% weapon damage.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Vindictive
weaponTalents.description: Killing an enemy with a status effect applied grants all group members within 20m 21% critical hit chance and 21% critical hit damage for 20 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Unhinged
weaponTalents.description: Receive 22% weapon damage at the cost of 25% stability and 25% accuracy.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Sadist
weaponTalents.description: Deal +35% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 3 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy hit.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Fast Hands
weaponTalents.description: Critical hits add a stack of 5% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Optimized
weaponTalents.description: Increase weapon handling by 40%.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Overwhelm
weaponTalents.description: Suppressing an enemy grants 12% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Steady Handed
weaponTalents.description: Hits grant a stack of 1% accuracy and stability. At 75 stacks, consumes them to refill the magazine.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Soft Spot
weaponTalents.description: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 24% Weapon Damage for 15s.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Rifleman
weaponTalents.description: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus 11% weapon damage for 5 seconds. Max stack is 6. Additional headshots refresh the duration.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Lucky Shot
weaponTalents.description: Magazine capacity is increased by 30%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Perpetuation
weaponTalents.description: Headshots grant 75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 16 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Sledgehammer
weaponTalents.description: Dealing damage with a grenade applies a mark on target. Targets with marks take 40% more damage to armor and -10% movement speed.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Spike
weaponTalents.description: Headshots grant 25% skill damage for 15 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Boomerang
weaponTalents.description: Critical hits have a 75% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned, the next shot has 50% increased damage.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Behind You
weaponTalents.description: Amplifies weapon damage by +25% to enemies that are not targeting you.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Naked
weaponTalents.description: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants 50% headshot damage for 8 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Reformation
weaponTalents.description: Headshots grant 80% skill repair for 15 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Ranger
weaponTalents.description: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 3 meters you are away from the target.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect First Blood
weaponTalents.description: If scoped, your first 2 shots fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deal headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires 8x scope or higher.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Determined
weaponTalents.description: After killing an enemy with a headshot, the next shot on any enemy is a guaranteed critical headshot. Killing an enemy will not retrigger the talent while active.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Eyeless
weaponTalents.description: Deal 35% weapon damage to blinded enemies. After 3 kills, applies blind to the next enemy hit.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Pumped Up
weaponTalents.description: Reloading grants 6% weapon damage for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Jazz Hands
weaponTalents.description: Increase reload speed by 50%.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Pummel
weaponTalents.description: 2 consecutive kills refill the magazine and grant 40% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Brazen
weaponTalents.description: Receive +1% Amplified Damage on the next shot for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 4 pellets hit.

weaponTalents.name: Perfectly Extra
weaponTalents.description: Increased magazine size by 50%.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Distance
weaponTalents.description: Increase optimal range by 100%.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Salvage
weaponTalents.description: Killing a target has a 85% chance to refill the magazine.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Breadbasket
weaponTalents.description: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus 70% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10 seconds. Max stack is 2.

weaponTalents.name: Perfect Finisher
weaponTalents.description: Swapping from this weapon within 10 seconds of killing an enemy grants 35% critical hit chance and 40% critical hit damage for 15 seconds.

weaponTalents.name: Future Perfection (MMR)
weaponTalents.description: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 3 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.

weaponTalents.name: Hidden Rock
weaponTalents.description: Headshots apply confuse. Cooldown: 20s.

gearTalents.name: Obliterate
gearTalents.description: Critical hits increase weapon damage by 1% for 5s, stacking up to 25%.

gearTalents.name: Intimidate
gearTalents.description: +35% weapon damage to enemies within 10m while you have bonus armor.

gearTalents.name: Obliterate
gearTalents.description: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 10s. Stacks up to 20 times.

gearTalents.name: Focus
gearTalents.description: Increases total weapon damage by 5% every second while aiming with 8x scope or higher, up to 50%.

gearTalents.name: Headhunter
gearTalents.description: After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 30s deals 125% of that killing blow's damage in addition to it.

gearTalents.name: Overwatch
gearTalents.description: After staying in cover for 10s, increase your and all allies' total weapon and skill damage by 12% as long as you remain in cover.

gearTalents.name: Trauma
gearTalents.description: Applies blind to an enemy hit in the head. Applies bleed to an enemy hit in the chest. Cooldown: 30s.

gearTalents.name: Mad Bomber
gearTalents.description: Grenade radius increased by 50%. Grenades that kill an enemy are refunded. Grenades can be cooked.

gearTalents.name: Braced
gearTalents.description: While in cover weapon handling is increased by 45%.

gearTalents.name: Skilled
gearTalents.description: Skill kills have a 25% chance to reset skill cooldowns.

gearTalents.name: Tag Team
gearTalents.description: The last enemy damaged with a skill is marked. Dealing weapon damage to that enemy reduces active cooldowns by 6s. Cooldown: 4s.

gearTalents.name: Tamper Proof
gearTalents.description: Enemies that walk within 3m of your hive, turret, remote pulse, or decoy are shocked. Cooldown per skill: 10s.

gearTalents.name: Reassigned
gearTalents.description: Killing an enemy adds 1 round of random special ammo into your sidearm. Cooldown: 15s.

gearTalents.name: Efficient
gearTalents.description: Using an armor kit has a 50% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

gearTalents.name: Spark
gearTalents.description: Applying a status effect grants +15% weapon damage for 15s.

gearTalents.name: Empathic Resolve
gearTalents.description: Repairing an ally increases their weapon and skill damage by up to 15% for 20s.

gearTalents.name: Kinetic Momentum
gearTalents.description: Each active skill generates stacks granting +1% skill damage and +2% skill repair, up to 15 stacks.

gearTalents.name: Vanguard
gearTalents.description: Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 45% armor as bonus armor to allies for 20s.

gearTalents.name: Spotter
gearTalents.description: +15% weapon and skill damage to pulsed enemies.

gearTalents.name: Glass Cannon
gearTalents.description: All damage amplified by 25%. All damage taken amplified by 50%.

gearTalents.name: Unbreakable
gearTalents.description: When armor is depleted, repair 95% of total armor. Cooldown 60s.

gearTalents.name: Gunslinger
gearTalents.description: Weapon swapping increases total weapon damage by 23% for 5s. This buff is lost for 5s if you weapon swap while it is active.

gearTalents.name: Vigilance
gearTalents.description: Increases weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage disables this bonus for 4s.

gearTalents.name: Combined Arms
gearTalents.description: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage by 25% for 3s.

gearTalents.name: Tech Support
gearTalents.description: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 25s.

gearTalents.name: Opportunistic
gearTalents.description: Enemies hit with shotguns and marksman rifles amplify the damage they take by 10% from all sources for 5s.

gearTalents.name: Safeguard
gearTalents.description: While at full armor, increases total skill repair by 130%.

gearTalents.name: Leadership
gearTalents.description: Performing a cover to cover grants 15% of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Protector
gearTalents.description: When your shield is damaged, you gain +5% and all other allies gain +15% of your armor as bonus armor for 3s. Cooldown: 3s.

gearTalents.name: Adrenaline Rush
gearTalents.description: When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 20% bonus armor for 5s. Stacks up to 3 times. Cooldown: 5s.

gearTalents.name: Galvanize
gearTalents.description: Applying a Blind, Ensnare, Confuse, or Shock to an enemy grants 40% of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies within 20m for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Energize
gearTalents.description: Using an armor kit grants +1 skill tier for 15s. If already at skill tier 6, grants overcharge. Cooldown: 60s.

gearTalents.name: Calculated
gearTalents.description: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 10%.

gearTalents.name: Overclock
gearTalents.description: You and allies within 7m of your deployed skills gain +25% reload speed and reduces active cooldowns by 0.2 each second.

gearTalents.name: Creeping Death
gearTalents.description: When you apply a status effect it also applies to all enemies within 8m. Cooldown 15s.

gearTalents.name: Composure
gearTalents.description: While in cover, increases total weapon damage by 15%.

gearTalents.name: Hardened
gearTalents.description: Increases armor by 10%.

gearTalents.name: Clutch
gearTalents.description: Critical hits restore 2% armor.

gearTalents.name: Patience
gearTalents.description: After being in cover for 3s, repair 3% armor per second.

gearTalents.name: Concussion
gearTalents.description: Headshots grant +10% headshot damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times.

gearTalents.name: Shock & Awe
gearTalents.description: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 20s.

gearTalents.name: Wicked
gearTalents.description: +18% weapon damage for 20s after applying a status effect.

gearTalents.name: Bloodsucker
gearTalents.description: Killing an enemy adds +10% bonus armor for 10s. Max 10 stacks.

gearTalents.name: Unstoppable Force
gearTalents.description: Killing an enemy increases weapon damage by 5% for 15s. Stacks up to 5.

gearTalents.name: Versatile
gearTalents.description: Swapping weapons amplifies weapon damage based on weapon type for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Hardened
gearTalents.description: Increases armor by 15%.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Obliterate
gearTalents.description: Critical hits increase weapon damage by 1% for 5s, stacking up to 25%. Stacks refresh on crit.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Intimidate
gearTalents.description: +40% weapon damage to enemies within 10m while you have bonus armor.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Spark
gearTalents.description: Applying a status effect grants +20% weapon damage for 15s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Glass Cannon
gearTalents.description: All damage amplified by 30%. All damage taken amplified by 50%.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Unbreakable
gearTalents.description: When armor is depleted, repair 115% of total armor. Cooldown 60s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Gunslinger
gearTalents.description: Weapon swapping increases total weapon damage by 28% for 5s. This buff is lost for 5s if you weapon swap while it is active.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Vanguard
gearTalents.description: Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 60% of your armor as bonus armor to all allies for 20s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Spotter
gearTalents.description: +20% weapon and skill damage to pulsed enemies.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Overwatch
gearTalents.description: While in cover, shots that hit enemies beyond 25m grant +3% weapon damage for 5s, stacking up to 15 times.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Headhunter
gearTalents.description: After landing a headshot, your next weapon shot deals +150% of that weapon's damage.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Trauma
gearTalents.description: Headshots apply bleed to the target. Bleeding enemies take +20% weapon damage from you.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Kinetic Momentum
gearTalents.description: Each active skill generates stacks granting +1.5% skill damage and +3% skill repair, up to 15 stacks.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Companion
gearTalents.description: While a skill is active, gain +15% weapon damage. While no skill is active, gain +15% skill damage.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Explosive Delivery
gearTalents.description: Throwing a grenade grants +35% weapon damage for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Mad Bomber
gearTalents.description: +50% Grenade Damage. +50% Grenade Radius.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Braced
gearTalents.description: While in cover, gain +20% weapon damage and +20% weapon handling.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Focus
gearTalents.description: Every 0.5s you remain stationary, gain +5% weapon damage, up to +50%.

gearTalents.name: Entrench
gearTalents.description: If you are below 30% armor, headshots from cover repair 20% of your armor. Cooldown: 2s.

gearTalents.name: Protected Reload
gearTalents.description: Grants +20% bonus armor while reloading. Grants 0-18% of your armor as bonus armor to allies when they reload.

gearTalents.name: Companion
gearTalents.description: While you are within 5m of an ally or skill, total weapon damage is increased by 15%.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Entrench
gearTalents.description: Headshots while in cover grant +10% armor for 5s.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Skilled
gearTalents.description: Activating a skill grants +25% weapon damage for 15s.

gearTalents.name: Challenger
gearTalents.description: Exotic: Killing an enemy within 10m grants +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 10 times.

gearTalents.name: Bond
gearTalents.description: Exotic: Gain +5% weapon damage for each active skill. Gain +5% skill damage for each active weapon.

gearTalents.name: Parabellum Rounds
gearTalents.description: Ongoing Directive 4pc amplifier: Increases Hollow-Point Ammo damage from 20% to 50%. Does not apply to party members.

gearTalents.name: Snowball
gearTalents.description: Tipping Scales: Increase the Critical Hit Damage received per stack from 4% to 7%.

gearTalents.name: Risk Management
gearTalents.description: Striker's Battlegear: Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker's Gamble from 0.65% to 0.9%.

gearTalents.name: Hollow-Point Ammo
gearTalents.description: Ongoing Directive: Enemies affected by a status effect drop Hollow-Point Ammo on death. Hollow-Point Ammo deals +20% weapon damage.

gearTalents.name: Makeshift Repairs
gearTalents.description: Foundry Bulwark: Shooting an enemy repairs 0.5% of your armor per hit. Cooldown: 0.5s.

gearTalents.name: Overcharge
gearTalents.description: Hard Wired: Activating a skill grants Overcharge for 15s. Cooldown: 60s.

gearTalents.name: Proliferation
gearTalents.description: Eclipse Protocol: Status effects you apply spread to one additional enemy within 8m. Cooldown: 5s.

gearTalents.name: Aces High
gearTalents.description: Aces & Eights: Headshots grant a stack of +5% weapon damage (max 8). Stacks are lost when you reload.

gearTalents.name: Bulwark Protocol
gearTalents.description: Aegis: Deploying a shield grants +20% weapon damage to all allies within 20m for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Umbra Protocol
gearTalents.description: Umbra Initiative: Kills grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times.

gearTalents.name: Scales of Justice
gearTalents.description: Tipping Scales: Kills with LMGs grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times.

gearTalents.name: Press the Advantage
gearTalents.description: Striker's Battlegear: Increases max stacks for Striker's Gamble from 100 to 200.

gearTalents.name: Stars and Stripes
gearTalents.description: True Patriot: Shooting an enemy applies a debuff. Debuffed enemies take +10% weapon damage from all sources.

gearTalents.name: Tactical Superiority
gearTalents.description: Ongoing Directive: Hollow-Point Ammo also applies a status effect on hit.

gearTalents.name: Armor Overflow
gearTalents.description: Foundry Bulwark: Bonus armor from Foundry set bonuses is increased by 50%.

gearTalents.name: Feedback Loop
gearTalents.description: Hard Wired: Skill kills reduce all skill cooldowns by 20%.

gearTalents.name: Symptom Aggravator
gearTalents.description: Eclipse Protocol: Enemies with 3 or more status effects take +20% weapon and skill damage.

gearTalents.name: Dead Man's Hand
gearTalents.description: Aces & Eights: Headshots deal +50% weapon damage when you have 8 stacks of Aces High.

gearTalents.name: Shield Surge
gearTalents.description: Aegis: Shield health is increased by 50%. Destroying a shield grants +20% weapon damage for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Umbra Surge
gearTalents.description: Umbra Initiative: Kills grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times.

gearTalents.name: Sustainability
gearTalents.description: Tipping Scales: Increase the maximum number of stacks from 50 to 75.

gearTalents.name: Point of no Return
gearTalents.description: Breaking Point: Increase On Point bonuses timer from 10s to 15s.

gearTalents.name: Overcharging
gearTalents.description: Cavalier: Increases Charger max incoming damage protection to 70%.

gearTalents.name: All for One
gearTalents.description: Concentrated Company: Increase the amount of marks that can be placed from 4 to 8.

gearTalents.name: Tactical Superiority
gearTalents.description: Future Initiative: Increases Ground Control damage bonus from 15% to 25%.

gearTalents.name: Max BPM
gearTalents.description: Heartbreaker: Max stack is now 100.

gearTalents.name: Endless Hunger
gearTalents.description: Hotshot: Increases the duration of Apex Predator stacks from 10s to 30s.

gearTalents.name: Hivemind
gearTalents.description: Hunter's Fury: Decrease the Overcharge cooldown from 40s to 25s.

gearTalents.name: Target Rich Environment
gearTalents.description: Measured Assembly: Increases Crowd Control mark count from 3 to 5.

gearTalents.name: Parabellum Rounds
gearTalents.description: Negotiator's Dilemma: Increases Hollow-Point Ammo weapon damage amplification to 50%.

gearTalents.name: Chain Combustion
gearTalents.description: Ortiz: Exuro: Enemies set ablaze by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype ignite other enemies within 2m.

gearTalents.name: Best Buds
gearTalents.description: Refactor: Increase the damage buff from 25% to 50%.

gearTalents.name: Press the Advantage
gearTalents.description: Rigger: Increases max stacks for Striker's Gamble from 100 to 200.

gearTalents.name: Specialized Destruction
gearTalents.description: System Corruption: Increase Aggressive Recon Signature Weapon Damage bonus from 15% to 30%.

gearTalents.name: Sustainability
gearTalents.description: Tip of the Spear: Increase the maximum number of stacks from 50 to 75.

gearTalents.name: Waving the Flag
gearTalents.description: True Patriot: Increases Red, White, and Blue rotation speed to 1.5 seconds.

gearTalents.name: Fortissimo
gearTalents.description: Virtuoso: Double the weapon damage bonus from Symphony.

gearTalents.name: Point of Honor
gearTalents.description: Breaking Point: Increases On Point Weapon Damage bonus from 4% to 7.2%.

gearTalents.name: Safe Charging
gearTalents.description: Cavalier: Charging gives 10% protection per second.

gearTalents.name: One for All
gearTalents.description: Concentrated Company: Increase the Weapon Damage bonus per stack from 3% to 5%.

gearTalents.name: Advanced Combat Tactics
gearTalents.description: Future Initiative: Increases Ground Control proximity repair from 60% to 120%.

gearTalents.name: Cold
gearTalents.description: Heartbreaker: Stacks now supply +2% bonus armor.

gearTalents.name: Overwhelming Force
gearTalents.description: Hotshot: Increases the radius of disorient on Apex Predator kills from 5m to 10m.

gearTalents.name: Smart Cooperation
gearTalents.description: Hunter's Fury: Decrease the cooldown for destroying Mortars and enemy skills from 10s to 1s.

gearTalents.name: Critical Measures
gearTalents.description: Measured Assembly: Increases Crowd Control damage to additional marked enemies from 60% to 112%.

gearTalents.name: Trauma Specialist
gearTalents.description: Negotiator's Dilemma: Increases duration of bleed status effects by 50% and all bleed damage done by 100%.

gearTalents.name: Heatstroke
gearTalents.description: Ortiz: Exuro: +25% Weapon Damage to enemies set on fire by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype.

gearTalents.name: Complete Uptime
gearTalents.description: Refactor: Cancelling your skills will reset their cooldown.

gearTalents.name: Risk Management
gearTalents.description: Rigger: Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker's Gamble from 0.65% to 0.9%.

gearTalents.name: Signature Moves
gearTalents.description: System Corruption: +50% Weapon Damage for 15s after fully depleting the Signature Weapon of ammo.

gearTalents.name: Snowball
gearTalents.description: Tip of the Spear: Increase the Critical Hit Damage received per stack from 4% to 7%.

gearTalents.name: Accelerando
gearTalents.description: Virtuoso: Decreases the number of stacks needed to proc the Symphony double buffs from 4 to 3.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Vigilance
gearTalents.description: Increases weapon damage by 30%. Taking damage disables this bonus for 4s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Composure
gearTalents.description: While in cover, increases total weapon damage by 20%.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Clutch
gearTalents.description: Critical hits restore 3% armor.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Concussion
gearTalents.description: Headshots grant +15% headshot damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Wicked
gearTalents.description: +25% weapon damage for 20s after applying a status effect.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Bloodsucker
gearTalents.description: Killing an enemy adds +15% bonus armor for 10s. Max 10 stacks.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Unstoppable Force
gearTalents.description: Killing an enemy increases weapon damage by 8% for 15s. Stacks up to 5.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Versatile
gearTalents.description: Swapping weapons amplifies weapon damage based on weapon type for 10s. Bonus is 50% higher.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Shock and Awe
gearTalents.description: Applying a status effect grants +25% weapon damage for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Creeping Death
gearTalents.description: When you apply a status effect it also applies to all enemies within 12m. Cooldown 10s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Overclock
gearTalents.description: Activating a skill overcharges it for 10s, granting +50% skill damage and +50% skill repair.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Leadership
gearTalents.description: Kills grant +5% weapon damage to all allies for 10s. Stacks up to 5 times.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Adrenaline Rush
gearTalents.description: Sprinting for 0.5s grants +20% weapon damage for 5s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Combined Arms
gearTalents.description: Damaging an enemy with a skill increases weapon damage by 25% for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Calculated
gearTalents.description: Skill kills grant +30% skill damage for 15s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Energize
gearTalents.description: Activating a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 15s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Galvanize
gearTalents.description: Applying a status effect grants +30% skill damage for 15s.

gearTalents.name: Perfect Tech Support
gearTalents.description: Repairing a skill grants +25% skill damage for 15s.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Tamper Proof
gearTalents.description: Enemies that destroy your skills take 500% of the skill's remaining health as damage.

gearTalents.name: Perfectly Opportunistic
gearTalents.description: Applying a disrupt, blind, or confuse to an enemy grants +25% weapon damage for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Fireworks Show
gearTalents.description: Killing an enemy with a grenade grants +30% weapon damage for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Rebalance
gearTalents.description: Exotic: Gain +10% weapon damage for each equipped gear set or brand set bonus active.

gearTalents.name: Combat Medic
gearTalents.description: Exotic: Repairing an ally also repairs 20% of your armor. Repairing yourself also repairs 20% of all allies' armor.

gearTalents.name: Bewildered
gearTalents.description: Applying a disorient to an enemy grants +40% weapon damage for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Flurry
gearTalents.description: Applying a status effect grants +20% status effect damage for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Toxic Delivery
gearTalents.description: Status effects also apply a DoT for 10s equal to 50% of concussion grenade damage, increased by status effect attributes.

gearTalents.name: Vicious Cycle
gearTalents.description: Taking damage builds stacks (max 30), each granting 1% WD. At max stacks, purge triggers a healing cloud restoring 5% armor/s for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Bleeding Edge
gearTalents.description: Shooting enemies within 15m applies bleed. Repair 3-48% armor/s per bleeding enemy within 15m.

gearTalents.name: Ablative Nano-Plating
gearTalents.description: When armor breaks (you or ally), grant 80% of your armor as bonus armor for 10s. Cooldown 45s per ally.

gearTalents.name: Hoarder
gearTalents.description: +3 Grenade Capacity, +50% Grenade Radius, +35% Grenade Damage, +25% per extra enemy in blast. Auto-regen grenades every 30s if below 2.

gearTalents.name: Kill Confirmed
gearTalents.description: Enemies drop trophies on death. Collecting grants short-term buff (scales with core count) and long-term +1% WD/SE/0.1% ArmorRegen per trophy for 300s (max 30).

gearTalents.name: One in Hand
gearTalents.description: Throwing a grenade refunds it and grants +1 Skill Tier for 15s. Grants Overcharge if already at Tier 6. Cooldown 60s.

gearTalents.name: Resourceful
gearTalents.description: Slots in with any equipped Gear Set or Brand Set to fulfill a set bonus requirement. Can unlock bonuses from multiple sets simultaneously.

gearTalents.name: Transference Overclock
gearTalents.description: +15% Hive skill haste per skill tier. Detonating a Hive refreshes all allies skill cooldowns and grants Overcharge for 15s. Cooldown 120s per ally.

gearTalents.name: Over the Top
gearTalents.description: Grenade or melee hit activates Seeing Red: +25% WD +100% melee damage for 20s. Cooldown 60s (reset by melee/grenade hit).

gearTalents.name: Iron Grip
gearTalents.description: -50% recoil penalty when hip-firing. -50% recoil penalty when blind-firing from cover.

gearTalents.name: Weakest Link
gearTalents.description: Shots mark the enemy with the lowest armor in a group. Marked enemies take +20% weapon damage from all sources for 10s.

gearTalents.name: Quick Draw
gearTalents.description: While pistol is holstered, gain stacking buff every 0.5s (max 100). Swapping to pistol consumes buff: first shot deals +10% damage per stack as headshot damage.

gearTalents.name: Dragon's Glare
gearTalents.description: While in combat, applies burn to the closest enemy within 20m. Cooldown 40s.

gearTalents.name: Counter
gearTalents.description: Weapon swapping cycles bonuses: 1) +20% RoF +20% WD, 2) +50% Mag Size +50% Reload Speed. Each lasts 12s or until next swap. Sidearm swap does not trigger.

gearTalents.name: Alternating Current
gearTalents.description: Generate 3% skill damage stack on one skill every second (max 10). After 10s at cap, stacks transfer to other skill. Repeats indefinitely.

gearTalents.name: Defibrillator
gearTalents.description: -50% stun from Shock. Shield melee deals +100% damage. With St. Elmo's: melee applies Shock with 5m radius. Cooldown 15s.

gearTalents.name: Rooted
gearTalents.description: While in cover, gain +20% weapon damage. Moving out of cover removes the bonus for 5s.

gearTalents.name: Escape Plan
gearTalents.description: Vaulting/climbing/dropping gives +10% Move Speed for 3s. Not moving for 5s gives +20% Move Speed for 5s. Status effect gives +10% Move Speed for 5s. -50% movement impairment from status effects.

gearTalents.name: Slotted (Investor)
gearTalents.description: Receive bonuses for each non-Core Attribute on this item: Red = +10% Crit Damage, Yellow = +5% Skill Efficiency, Blue = +1% Armor Regen. (PvP: 0.5% Armor Regen)

gearTalents.name: Augment: Quantum
gearTalents.description: Provides a small chance to become temporarily immune to damage.

gearTalents.name: Augment: Echo
gearTalents.description: Each bullet fired has a chance to deal its damage a second time.

gearTalents.name: Augment: Atomize
gearTalents.description: Increases grenade radius and damage.

gearTalents.name: Augment: Amalgam
gearTalents.description: Each bullet hit has a chance to apply a random status effect.

gearTalents.name: Augment: Trapper
gearTalents.description: Increases the duration of status effects you apply.

gearTalents.name: Augment: Entropy
gearTalents.description: Increases your Health based on a percentage of your total Armor.

gearTalents.name: Augment: Anomaly
gearTalents.description: Skills restore a portion of the damage they deal as healing.

gearTalents.name: Augment: Paradox
gearTalents.description: Provides a chance to refill part of your magazine while firing.

gearTalents.name: Augment: Synesthesia
gearTalents.description: Bullet hits have a chance to slightly reduce skill cooldowns.

weaponAttributes.name: Damage to Targets Out of Cover
